nasb.text: Ahab also made the Asherah. Thus Ahab did more to provoke the Lord God of Israel than all the kings of Israel who were before him.

esv.text: And Ahab made an Asherah. Ahab did more to provoke the Lord, the God of Israel, to anger than all the kings of Israel who were before him.

cnv.text: 亞哈又做了亞舍拉，亞哈所行的，惹耶和華以色列的　神發怒，比他以前所有的以色列王更厲害。

ccb.text: 他还造了亚舍拉神像，所作所为比先前诸王更惹以色列的上帝耶和华发怒。
